summary: Excellent, clean recording of a great show with an outstanding second set.
review: Both reviewers rave about the performance, calling the sets “great” and especially highlighting the fire‑filled second set. The audio is described as clean and roomy, capturing the auditorium ambience nicely, making it a very listenable record.

ai_rating.rationale: Two consistent 5‑star reviews praise both the musical performance and the sound quality; no negatives were noted, indicating an exceptional show with excellent recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clean, roomy sound that captures auditorium echo; clear mix without reported issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Overall great sets with the second set singled out as a highlight; pacing and energy praised throughout.
